header_title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

header_subtitle.text: Descoperi receptas ex tot li mundi
header_subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

home_page_hero_title.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Naviga receptas authentic ex cuisine mundiali
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

home_page_featured_title.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

recipe_card_easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

recipe_card_medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

recipe_card_hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Ric brod de ossos de porco con chashu tender, ov soft-cuit, e noodles fresc.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pitza classic Neapolitan con tomates San Marzano, mozzarella fresc, e basilic.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Nomine del recet Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos de porco marinat con ananas, coriandro, e cepe sur tortillas de gran.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Description del recet Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Nomine del recet Pollo al Buter.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Pollo tender in un salsa cremose de tomate e buter con spices aromatic.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Description del recet Pollo al Buter.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Noodles de rice saltat con crevettes, tofu, arachides, e salsa de tamarindo.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes fin e delicat plenat con Nutella, fragoles fresc, e crema frapat.
